creator: phryk-ports@wzff.de
text:
When starting Ardour (installed from official pkg repo or built with default options),
the program dies with:

`ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/ardour8/libardour.so.3: Undefined symbol "_ZTIN6ARDOUR14VST3PluginInfoE"`

With the VST3 in the symbol name I'm suspecting this won't happen when enabling the "NEW" port option for VST3 support. Currently building with the option enabled and will report back if the problem persists.
